testsuite.name: agentforge.agent.MCPClientTest

testcase.name: invokeTool with unknown tool returns error
tools from multiple servers are all discoverable
discoverTools with no servers returns empty
invokeTool calls tool and returns result
serverCount returns number of registered servers

testsuite.system-out: 08:31:25.889 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'default' with 2 tools 08:31:25.889 [] DEBUG agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Tool web_search invoked: success=true 08:31:25.889 [] DEBUG agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Tool web_search invoked: success=true 08:31:25.890 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'default' with 2 tools 08:31:25.890 [] ERROR agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Tool web_search invocation failed: Server crashed 08:31:25.891 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'default' with 2 tools 08:31:25.891 [] WARN agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Tool not found: nonexistent 08:31:25.891 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'default' with 2 tools 08:31:25.892 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'code' with 1 tools 08:31:25.892 [] DEBUG agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Tool code_execute invoked: success=true 08:31:25.892 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'default' with 2 tools 08:31:25.892 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'code' with 1 tools 08:31:25.893 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'default' with 2 tools 08:31:25.893 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'default' with 2 tools 08:31:25.893 [] DEBUG agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Tool web_search invoked: success=true 08:31:25.894 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'default' with 2 tools 08:31:25.895 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'default' with 2 tools 08:31:25.895 [Test worker] INFO agentforge.agent.MCPClient -- Added MCP server 'another' with 0 tools
